name: Corrupted Hero II - The New Order

Story Description: A Fractured Metropolis and the War for Its Soul

In the neon-drenched dystopia of Wellington DC, a city once guarded by shining heroes now writhes under the gilded boot of the Serpent’s Hero Association—a corrupted regime led by the brainwashed icon Captain Grander and the cunning mastermind The Viper. The fall began with the systematic abduction of the Heroes’ Lair’s female champions, culminating in Lumina’s tragic capture and transformation into a puppet of control. Her televised subjugation, alongside her former comrades, marked the birth of the New Order: a surveillance state draped in the rhetoric of “peace,
creator: AvGen_Fr
